zh.lifeSummary: 當Bernard Wolf Vogelgesang於1606年7月20日出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲茨魏布呂肯時，他的父親Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger46歲，母親Maria Wilrich26歲。他於大約1635年與Anna Catharina Landorff在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 皮爾馬森斯霍恩巴賀結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他在德國海藍-普法爾茲茨魏布呂肯霍恩巴賀被列為herzoglicher zweibrückerischer förster zu hornbach。他去世於1652年在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 皮爾馬森斯霍恩巴賀享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bernard Wolf Vogelgesang于1606年7月20日出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲茨魏布呂肯时，他的父亲Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger46岁，母亲Maria Wilrich26岁。他于大约1635年与Anna Catharina Landorff在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 皮爾馬森斯霍恩巴賀结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他在德国海藍-普法爾茲茨魏布呂肯霍恩巴賀被列为herzoglicher zweibrückerischer förster zu hornbach。他去世于1652年在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 皮爾馬森斯霍恩巴賀享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vogelgesang
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Vogelsang
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ingo, Kurt, Bernd, Dieter, Erwin, Fritz, Gerhard, Gunther, Joerg, Otto, Willi.
German: habitational name from any of several places called Vogelsang all over Germany; or a topographic name from a field name. Compare   Birdsong  .

nameMeanings.name: Bernard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

nameMeanings.name: Wolf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name of the animal (Old English wolf), in part a transferred use of the surname which originated as a nickname from this word, or an adoption of a German short form of any of the various compound names (such as Wolfgang and Wolfram ; ) with this first element.

en.lifeSummary: When Bernard Wolf Vogelgesang was born on 20 July 1606, in Zweibrücken, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger, was 46 and his mother, Maria Wilrich, was 26. He married Anna Catharina Landorff about 1635, in Hornbach, Pirmasens, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. His occupation is listed as herzoglicher zweibrückerischer förster zu hornbach in Hornbach, Zweibrücken, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. He died in 1652, in Hornbach, Pirmasens, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 46.

fr.Saarbrücken, Saarbrücken, Saarland, Germ: Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, La Sarre, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bernard Wolf Vogelgesang est né le 20 juillet 1606, à Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Maria Wilrich, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Anna Catharina Landorff environ 1635, à Hornbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Sa profession de son indiquée est herzoglicher zweibrückerischer förster zu hornbach à Hornbach, Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne. Il est décédé en 1652, à Hornbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bernard Wolf Vogelgesang am 20. Juli 1606 in Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger 46 und seine Mutter Maria Wilrich 26. Er hat um 1635 in Hornbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland Anna Catharina Landorff geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. sein Beruf ist als herzoglicher zweibrückerischer förster zu hornbach in Hornbach, Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland aufgeführt. Er starb 1652 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Hornbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bernard Wolf Vogelgesang è nato il il 20 luglio 1606 nel Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, il suo padre, Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Maria Wilrich, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Anna Catharina Landorff circa 1635, nel Hornbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. La sua occupazione è indicata come herzoglicher zweibrückerischer förster zu hornbach nel Hornbach, Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania. Morì nel 1652, nel Hornbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bernard Wolf Vogelgesangが1606年7月20日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズズウエイブルuクンで生まれた時，父Magnus Theodor Vogelfengerは46歳，母Maria Wilrichは26歳であった。約1635年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス ピルマセンスホールンバチでAnna Catharina Landorffと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。ドイツルヘインランド-プファルズズウエイブルuクンホールンバチでの職業はherzoglicher zweibrückerischer förster zu hornbachと記録されている。彼は1652年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス ピルマセンスホールンバチで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bernard Wolf Vogelgesang(이)가 1606년 7월 20일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 즈위브uc켄에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Wilrich(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1635년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 피마센스 호른바치에서 Anna Catharina Landorff(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 즈위브uc켄 호른바치에서 herzoglicher zweibrückerischer förster zu hornbach이었다. 그는 1652년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 피마센스 호른바치에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bernard Wolf Vogelgesang nasceu em 20 de julho de 1606, em Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Maria Wilrich, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Catharina Landorff aproximadamente 1635, em Hornbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Sua profissão aparece como herzoglicher zweibrückerischer förster zu hornbach em Hornbach, Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha. Ele faleceu em 1652, em Hornbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bernard Wolf Vogelgesang родился 20 июля 1606 г. в местности звибрuккен, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, его отцу по имени Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Wilrich, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Catharina Landorff около 1635 г. в местности хаурнбач, ландкрис пирмеисенс, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей.  Он работал по профессии herzoglicher zweibrückerischer förster zu hornbach в местности хаурнбач, звибрuккен, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. Он умер в 1652 г. в местности хаурнбач, ландкрис пирмеисенс, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bernard Wolf Vogelgesang nació el 20 de julio de 1606, en Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Maria Wilrich, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Anna Catharina Landorff aproximadamente 1635, en Hornbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Su ocupación registrada era herzoglicher zweibrückerischer förster zu hornbach en Hornbach, Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania. Murió en 1652, en Hornbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 46 años.
